info.title: Outlit API
info.summary: Public Outlit Platform and Ingest APIs.
info.description: Canonical OpenAPI specification for the public Outlit API surfaces documented at docs.outlit.ai.

tags.name: Platform API
tags.description: Authenticated API key routes for customer intelligence tools and integration management.

tags.name: Ingest API
tags.description: Public-key event ingestion routes used by Outlit SDKs.

post.description: Verify that the API key in the Authorization header can authenticate Platform API requests.
Call a public customer intelligence tool through the shared Outlit tool gateway.

input.query: What renewal concerns came up recently?

400.description: Invalid JSON, unknown tool name, or invalid tool input.

details.message: Too big: expected number to be <=1000

get.description: List Outlit agent templates that can be created by API, CLI, or MCP clients. This route is read-only.

403.description: The API key is valid but does not have the required agent read scope.

get.description: List action capabilities that an Outlit agent may reference. This route is read-only and does not grant actions to any agent.

403.description: The API key is valid but does not have the required agent read scope.

get.description: List configured Outlit agents for the authenticated organization. Read-only.

403.description: The API key is valid but does not have the required agent read scope.

503.description: The platform could not list agents.

post.description: Create an Outlit agent from a supported template. The initial template mode is draft-only: created resources are inert until explicitly configured in the platform.

200.description: Agent template resources were created in draft mode.

400.description: Invalid JSON or unsupported template request.

403.description: The API key is valid but does not have the required agent write scope.

409.description: The requested template already exists for the organization.

503.description: The platform could not verify the created resources and rolled back the request.

get.description: Get one configured Outlit agent by id. Read-only.

403.description: The API key is valid but does not have the required agent read scope.

404.description: No agent was found for the authenticated organization and requested id.

503.description: The platform could not get the agent.

get.description: List available integrations and current connection status for the authenticated organization.

parameters.name: connectedOnly
parameters.description: When true, only returns currently connected integrations.

get.description: Inspect setup mode, required credential fields, and follow-up steps for one provider or all providers.

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: Optional public provider ID or CLI alias. When omitted, returns all provider capabilities.

post.description: Run a supported follow-up setup step for a connected provider, such as CRM mappings or webhook setup.
Connect a provider with direct credentials or create a browser-auth connection session.

200.description: Direct credential connection or browser session response.

get.description: Poll the state of a browser-auth integration connection session.

post.description: Disconnect a currently connected provider for the authenticated organization.

404.description: The provider is valid but no active connection exists.

get.description: Inspect the connection and model sync status for one public provider.

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: Public provider ID from the provider table.

post.description: Send tracking events to Outlit. The public key in the URL path identifies the workspace; no secret bearer token is required for this endpoint.

parameters.name: publicKey
parameters.description: Your organization's public key. Starts with pk_.

400.description: Invalid request body or event payload.

403.description: Invalid public key or unauthorized domain.

get.description: List configured Outlit automations for the authenticated organization. Read-only.

403.description: The API key is valid but does not have the required agent read scope.

503.description: The platform could not list automations.

post.description: Create an agent automation. Provide agentId; Outlit maps it to the hosted-agent processor internally.

400.description: The request body failed command validation.

403.description: The API key is valid but does not have the required agent write scope.

404.description: No resource was found for the authenticated organization and requested id.

409.description: The requested change conflicts with the current platform state.

503.description: The platform could not complete the command.

get.description: Get one configured Outlit automation by id. Read-only and does not include run history.

403.description: The API key is valid but does not have the required agent read scope.

404.description: No automation was found for the authenticated organization and requested id.

503.description: The platform could not get the automation.

post.description: Update an agent automation. Provide agentId; Outlit maps it to the hosted-agent processor internally.

404.description: No resource was found for the authenticated organization and requested id.

409.description: The requested change conflicts with the current platform state.

bearerAuth.description: Outlit API key using the Bearer ok_... format.

RateLimitLimit.description: Maximum requests allowed in the current window.

RateLimitRemaining.description: Requests remaining in the current window.

RateLimitReset.description: Unix timestamp when the current rate limit window resets.

input.description: Tool-specific input object validated against the shared @outlit/tools contract.

config.description: Direct credential config. Omit to create a browser-auth connection session.

visitorId.description: Browser visitor identifier. Required for client tracking.
